draftPrPolicy: create a Draft PR only after current folder, feature branch, clean status, latest commit SHA, and origin push are confirmed.
prHoldPolicy: after Draft PR creation, do not press Ready for review and do not merge until manual confirmation.
branchPolicy: base branch must be main and head branch must be the Phase21-29 feature branch; main direct push is prohibited.

localPreflightChecks.label: Confirm the current workspace folder before opening a PR.
Confirm the current branch is the Phase21-29 feature branch, not main.
Confirm working tree clean before opening the PR.
Confirm the latest commit SHA before opening the PR.
Confirm the feature branch has been pushed to origin.

githubPrCreationChecks.label: Use main as the PR base branch.
Use the Phase21-29 feature branch as the PR head branch.
Create the pull request as Draft.
PR body must state that Ready for review and merge are not performed.

draftPrHoldRules.label: Keep the PR in Draft state after creation.
Do not press Ready for review during Phase21-29.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not commit directly to main.
Do not force push to solve PR or refspec issues.
Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

privateLocalRules.label: Private repository and local-first operation remain required.
GitHub Pages is not required for this operation.
No public release or external delivery is included.

operationPrinciples: Draft PR creation is a stop point, not a merge point.
Confirm folder, branch, status, commit SHA, and origin push before opening the PR.
Use base main and head feature branch only.
Ready for review and merge require separate manual confirmation.
nextRecommendedStep: After creating the Draft PR, stop and report the PR number, branch, latest commit SHA, and that Ready for review / merge were not performed.
